name: Quality-Gated Workflow
description: Standard pattern for production workflows: ingest input → transform content → validate quality → publish results.

steps.name: Collect Input
steps.description: Discover and load source files and supporting reference data.

steps.name: Normalize Structure
steps.description: Apply heading, formatting, and structural normalization.

steps.name: Quality Gate
steps.description: Evaluate coverage, consistency, and compliance metrics against thresholds.

steps.name: Package Artifacts
steps.description: Emit manifests, reports, and final deliverables for downstream review.
